title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple Bombs on Netflix With Just 2.7M Views
text: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple has struggled significantly on Netflix, pulling in just 2.7 million views in its first six days on the platform in the United States. According to Nielsen viewership data, the streaming performance adds to the film's overall commercial struggles. The film had already disappointed at the theatrical box office with $25 million domestically and $57 million globally against a reported $63 million production budget. The weak streaming numbers raise additional concerns about the viability of the planned third film in the trilogy. The creative team has been open about the fact that the first two movies need to perform well at the box office and on streaming in order for the third one to become a reality. The combination of theatrical underperformance and disappointing streaming debuts suggests Sony may need to reconsider its plans for the trilogy's conclusion.
